sentence: 他收到了法院发来的传票。
pinyin: Tā shōudào le fǎyuàn fā lái de chuánpiào.
english: He received a summons from the court.

meaning: 1. to annotate; 2. annotation; 3. comment; 4. interpretation; 5. to ex
sentence: 这本古文书附有详细的注解。
pinyin: Zhè běn gǔwénshū fùyǒu xiángxì de zhùjiě.
english: This classical text comes with detailed annotations.

meaning: 1. machine room; 2. engine room; 3. computer room
sentence: 服务器都放在地下室的机房里。
pinyin: Fúwùqì dōu fàng zài dìxiàshì de jīfáng lǐ.
english: The servers are all kept in the machine room in the basement.

meaning: 1. internal affairs; 2. domestic affairs; 3. family affairs; 4. (trad.
sentence: 新兵每天早上都要整理内务。
pinyin: Xīnbīng měitiān zǎoshang dōu yào zhěnglǐ nèiwù.
english: New recruits have to tidy up their quarters every morning.

sentence: 市场里的商户都要按时缴纳摊位费。
pinyin: Shìchǎng lǐ de shānghù dōu yào ànshí jiǎonà tānwèifèi.
english: All merchants in the market must pay their stall fees on time.
